scripts.prebuild: npm run generate-assistants && npm run generate-presets && npm run generate-custom-overlay && npm run generate-dark-demo-cards && npm run generate-knowledge-bases && npm run generate-nuxt-ds-catalog && tsx scripts/generate-build-info.ts
scripts.postbuild: node scripts/check-sync-api.js && node scripts/check-banned-phrases.js && node scripts/check-figma-bundle-compat.js && tsx scripts/update-manifest-network-access.ts && npm run invariants
scripts.test: tsx src/core/assistants/instructionAssembly.test.ts && tsx src/core/assistants/instructionParity.test.ts && tsx src/core/assistants/routing.regression.test.ts && tsx src/core/assistants/handlers/contentReview.test.ts && tsx src/core/knowledgeBases/resolveKb.test.ts && tsx tests/accessibility-config.test.ts && tsx tests/kb-normalization.test.ts && tsx tests/kb-routes.test.ts && tsx tests/generate-knowledge-bases.test.ts && tsx tests/duplicates.test.ts && tsx tests/exclusionRules.test.ts && tsx admin-editor/src/content-models-parser.test.ts && tsx src/core/figma/textLinkRanges.test.ts && tsx src/core/contentTable/presetOrder.test.ts && tsx src/core/contentTable/renderers.test.ts
scripts.watch: npm run generate-assistants && npm run generate-presets && npm run generate-custom-overlay && tsx scripts/update-manifest-network-access.ts --watch && build-figma-plugin --typecheck --watch
